summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Scale Button, Save/Load gamma settings, and Power Advisory Panel. All backend tests passed (9/9 = 100%). Frontend UI tests verified Scale button, modal with frequency input, preview, and confirm button. Power Advisory Panel correctly displays warnings at high power (1500W). Save/Load API correctly persists all gamma settings including gammaTubeOd, gammaTubeLength, originalDrivenLength, reflectorNudgeCount, and reflectorPreset.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='scale-design-btn' not being detected by querySelector, though the button is visible and functional. Text-based selector works fine.

critical_code_review_comments: Scale feature (line 1242-1308): Correctly scales all element lengths, positions, gamma/hairpin settings, taper sections, stacking spacing, and height by frequency ratio
Save/Load (line 1103-1118 save, 1162-1212 load): Now includes gammaTubeOd, gammaTubeLength, originalDrivenLength, reflectorNudgeCount, reflectorPreset - all correctly persisted and restored
Power Advisory (line 2165-2204): Shows warnings when feed_type='gamma', power>=100W, and calculated values exceed thresholds (vCap>500V, rodCurrent>5A, vFeed>300V, power>=1500W)
Backend models.py (line 352-370): SaveDesignRequest and SavedDesign models correctly accept spacing_state dict which stores all gamma settings
seed_data_creation: Test user created for save/load testing: test_scale_<pid>@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: 1) Scale button visible in action row (teal #00897B), opens modal with frequency input, preview, quick-select buttons, and confirm. 2) Save/Load correctly persists gamma settings including new fields. 3) Power Advisory appears at 1500W showing rod current, feedpoint voltage, and general high-power warnings.

Scale button visible.evidence: Scale button visible in button row with teal background, clickable without login

Scale modal with frequency input.evidence: Modal opens showing current design (27.185 MHz), target frequency input, quick-select buttons (10m, 6m, 2m)

Save design with gamma settings.evidence: POST /api/designs/save accepts gammaTubeOd, gammaTubeLength, originalDrivenLength, reflectorNudgeCount, reflectorPreset

Load design restores gamma settings.evidence: GET /api/designs/<id> returns all gamma settings in spacing_state correctly

Power Advisory at high power.evidence: At 1500W: 'Rod current: 8.3A', 'Feedpoint voltage: 417V', and general 1500W advisory displayed
